steps.title: Identify Bergner's specific mechanism
steps.content: Bergner's proposed cause is specific: hydrogen trapped in water ice becomes gaseous and escapes, creating the acceleration. This mechanism requires both a source of trapped hydrogen and conditions to release it.

steps.title: Confirm the mechanism is valid
steps.content:
Choice D validates both requirements: cosmic radiation embeds hydrogen in water ice (source), and solar system warming triggers outgassing (release).

Choices A–C don't validate this mechanism:
  • A addresses problems with unrelated models
  • B contradicts it by proposing H₂ ice instead
  • C merely notes that nongravitational effects are subtle
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
